name: EKS cluster secrets not encrypted with KMS
description: Kubernetes secrets in this EKS cluster are not encrypted with a KMS customer managed key. Kubernetes secrets are stored in etcd base64-encoded (not encrypted at rest by default), exposing credentials, API tokens, and certificates to anyone with etcd access.
remediation: Enable envelope encryption for Kubernetes secrets using a KMS CMK. Create or specify a KMS key during cluster creation or update the cluster encryption configuration via the EKS console or API.
